override.note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Privaty (Water AR Attacker, Burst III, treasure; ammo 60, reloadFrames 81, chargeFrames 0 = autofire AR, hitsPerShot 1). S1 = fullBurstEnter team buff on ALL allies (ATK ▲23.61% / Reload Speed ▲51.16% / Max Ammo ▼50.66% / Attack Damage ▲20.16%, 10s); reload+ammo lines gate shot count (HARD RULE 1), modeled not skipped. S2 = two lastBullet riders: generic (Damage Taken ▲10.01% + 256.17%) and a 1687% rider gated on the burst's 'Designated Target' targetStatus. Burst = self elemAdvantageDamagePct ▲130% (prior 7), 1407.64% nuke, applies 'Designated Target' targetStatus enabling the S2 gate; ATK ▼5.02% kept inert; 3s stun SKIPPED (control). Riders crit:true/no-core/FB-by-timing-ON (prior 2). leakDetected: null.
caveats: skill2: 256.17% generic rider and 1687% Designated-Target rider modeled as INDEPENDENT (co-fire while status up); kit gives two ■ triggers, exclusivity unstated — ⚑ verify.
burst: 'Designated Target: ATK ▼5.02%' = targetStatus('Designated Target',10s) [opens S2 gate] + inert atkPct -5.02 boss debuff.
burst: 3s stun SKIPPED (control, no DPS vs partless boss).
skill2 riders crit:true/no-core/noFb-omitted (prior 2); burst 1407.64% nuke no crit (ein style) — ⚑ both.
burst: elemAdvantageDamagePct ▲130% live only with elemental advantage (prior 7); inert on neutral boss.

audit.effectOrReason: trigger fullBurstEnter (literal 'entering Full Burst' = any team FB, not burstCast)
buff reloadSpeedPct 51.16 dur 10 — weapon-state, gates shot count (HARD RULE 1)
buff maxAmmoPct -50.66 dur 10 — ammo capacity ▼ gates reload cadence (HARD RULE 1)

audit.kitLine: Activates when last bullet hits target

audit.effectOrReason: buff damageTakenPct 10.01 dur 10 on enemy (real damage amplifier)
flatDamage 256.17 crit:true (function rider; no core, FB-by-timing ON)
flatDamage 1687 crit:true (function rider; gated on burst status)
self block, trigger burstCast (own burst block)
flatDamage 1407.64 (burst-cast nuke, engine auto FB-exempt; no crit set)
control on immortal partless boss that deals no damage = zero DPS impact -> unmodeled.burst
targetStatus 'Designated Target' dur 10 (opens S2 gate) + inert atkPct -5.02 boss debuff

flags.estimate: AR autofire; datamine reloadFrames 81, ammo 60, rl3 7.6, chargeFrames 0
flags.reasoning: rate_of_fire/reload datamine-unreliable (prior 1). AR is autofire (chargeFrames 0) so NO SR/RL bolt-recovery ⚑ applies, but the base pulls-per-sec + reload tuple still sets lastBullet frequency and is not kit-derivable. The FB-window Reload Speed ▲51.16% + Max Ammo ▼50.66% compose with base cadence to drive reload/lastBullet rate.
flags.recipe: measure real pullsPerSec + reloadFrames from a Privaty-focused recording; confirm the FB-window reload/ammo composition against observed last-bullet cadence.

flags.estimate: modeled INDEPENDENT — both the 256.17% and the 1687% fire on a last-bullet hit while Designated Target is active
flags.reasoning: kit text gives two separate ■ triggers but does not state they are mutually exclusive; in-game the generic last-bullet rider may be replaced by (not stacked on) the designated-target rider during the status window.
flags.recipe: verify from footage whether the 256.17% proc co-fires with the 1687% proc inside the Designated Target window; if exclusive, gate skill2[0] off the status (or merge).

flags.estimate: fires on last-bullet hits during the 10s Designated Target window per Privaty burst (CD 40s)
flags.reasoning: status uptime + number of last-bullet hits inside the window are cadence/rotation-dependent; cannot be derived without the reload cadence.
flags.recipe: count last-bullet procs landing inside the 10s status window from footage; coupled to the cadence ⚑ above.

flags.estimate: crit:true on both riders (function-damage riders crit at caster rate)
flags.reasoning: prior-2 text-fidelity: function-type additional-damage riders CRIT by default, no core unless the text labels it core (it does not here). ein feathers (function riders) set crit:true.
flags.recipe: confirm orange popup bodies on the 256.17% / 1687% procs; drop crit:true if observed non-crit.

flags.reasoning: burst main-damage nuke, not a function rider; schema crit is opt-in and the ein burst-nuke style omits it. Uncertain whether burst skill damage crits in-engine.
flags.recipe: verify from footage whether the 1407.64% burst nuke crits; set crit:true if so.

flags.reasoning: lastBullet riders are non-burst-cast; prior 2 default is FB-by-timing ON unless measured FB-OFF. noRange is engine-automatic (not set).
flags.recipe: set noFb:true only if footage shows the procs landing WITHOUT the +50% Full-Burst major.

flags.estimate: 130% in the Damage Up bucket, live ONLY under elemental advantage
flags.reasoning: prior 7: element advantage is a clean ×1.10 unless the kit carries an elem-advantage damage buff — Privaty does, so it must be modeled; it is inert vs a neutral/non-advantaged scope-lock boss.
flags.recipe: confirm the boss element in graded comps; this buff moves only advantaged fights.
